resident_doc_policy.stage_switch_rule: keep only resident docs across stage switches; drop prior stage checklist, stage docs, and temporary focus

tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-checklist: Emit stage objective, required outputs, resident docs, stage docs, entry actions, exit gates, and discard policy.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-doc-contract: Emit the current stage document boundary.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-command-contract: Emit entry commands, gate commands, and stage-specific actions.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-graph-contract: Emit the graph/context role for the current stage.

governance_rules: Runtime rules must be consumed from machine-readable contracts instead of markdown.
staged skills must explicitly define resident docs, stage order, stage contracts, and stage-switch discard policy.
Narrative stage templates and machine contracts must be maintained separately.
notes: Replace placeholder command names if the skill uses different aliases.
